# CMClockInvalidate(_:)

**Function**

Stops the clock.

## Declaration

```swift
func CMClockInvalidate(_ clock: CMClock)
```

## Parameters

- **clock**: The clock to stop.

## Discussion

After invalidation, the clock returns errors from all APIs. Only the owner of the clock should call this function.
title: CMClockInvalidate(_:)
